purpose: GuideService is the read-only Electron main-process loader for documentation/guide markdown. It walks guide folders recursively, extracts titles and purpose metadata, preserves natural numeric ordering, returns grouped summaries for the Guide sidebar, and resolves a selected guide id/path/name back to full markdown content without allowing arbitrary filesystem access.
gotchas: Guide lookup only reads under documentation/guide and uses isSafeRelativePath before direct path resolution; do not widen it to arbitrary markdown paths.
patterns: Electron main-process service module exported via CommonJS and consumed by ipc-handlers or orchestration services.
conventions: Electron main-process files use CommonJS require/module.exports rather than ESM imports.
